body:
biblicallyaccurateromina:

“Oh High School would have sucked even if you were born a cis girl.”

Yeah but I would have been ME. Not some empty, hollow shell pretending to be normal, but ME. My struggles would have been glue to bind me to my peers, not further proof that I was some horrible thing that existed apart from them.

I didn’t want to be perfect, I wanted to be a normal girl.
